title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN INTEGRATED NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY TENANI, MUNICIPALITY OF PARANAS, PROVINCE OF SAMAR TO BE KNOWN AS TENANI INTEGRATED NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 4145; 106 OG No. 25, 3463 (June 21, 2010)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10059, March 24, 2010 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN INTEGRATED NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY TENANI, MUNICIPALITY OF PARANAS, PROVINCE OF SAMAR TO BE KNOWN AS TENANI INTEGRATED NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Establishment of an Integrated National High School.

â There is hereby established, under the supervision of the Department of Education, an integrated national high school in Barangay Tenani, Municipality of Paranas, Province of Samar to be known as Tenani Integrated National High School.

SEC. 2.

Appropriations.

â The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the Tenani Integrated National High School, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3.

Implementation.

â The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations that may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 4.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 10, 2009 and December 16, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: MAR 24 2010

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
